holdings.infoBox: ARKK is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 9.50%, Robinhood Markets at 4.93%, CRISPR Therapeutics AG at 4.87%, Tempus AI at 4.83%, and Space Exploration Technologies at 4.71%.

overview.description: The ARK Innovation ETF (ARKK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks long-term capital growth from companies globally involved with, or that benefit from, disruptive innovation. ARKK was launched on Oct 31, 2014 and is issued by ARK.
